skipped_smoke_tests.name: Settings UI — Providers Section (API Key Management)
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch the app, navigate to Settings → Providers. Click "Add API Key". Select "OpenAI" from provider dropdown. Enter a test API key. Click "Test Key" — verify green checkmark and "API key validated successfully" message appears. Click "Save" — verify key appears in the list with masked display (e.g., "sk-...abc123"). Click the copy button — verify key is copied to clipboard (paste into Notepad to confirm). Click "Delete" and confirm dialog. Verify key is removed from list.
